9:["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","ul","l-110",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-110-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":["The public reviewer pages are reachable and contain the expected PrivateDAO/Testnet/product fragments."]}],["$","li","l-110-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":["The API host is not returning a reverse-proxy failure or stale readiness response."]}],["$","li","l-110-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":["MagicBlock proof is internally consistent: the proof route is Devnet-bound because the current MagicBlock payment evidence is Devnet, and the returned transactions must be finalized."]}],["$","li","l-110-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":["QuickNode stream telemetry is configured for Solana Testnet and reports authenticated intake state."]}],["$","li","l-110-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":["REFHE payroll proof accepts a browser-style encrypted packet and returns a receipt hash."]}],["$","li","l-110-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":["Ika Solana pre-alpha approval preparation returns a deterministic route id for reviewer-visible custody planning."]}]]}]}]
a:["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","h2","h2-117",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":["Boundary"]}]}]
b:["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","p","p-122",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["This gate proves live service execution and public proof continuity. It does not claim mainnet real-funds launch, completed external audit, final Ika dWallet DKG signing, or a full Umbra private claim settlement. Those remain release gates tracked in the mainnet readiness documents."]}]}]
